final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for a Zhao Ling'er inspired character from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3x3 grid layout (9 panels total), each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include the character base: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, with all 9 expression variations:
  Top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include white paper with torn holes as the framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, playful atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, colorful direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panel positions, all 9 expressions, all 9 actions, and all 9 outfit colors exactly as specified; character must maintain consistent base appearance across all panels
Avoid:
